summary: The diff implements all three requirements comprehensively. REQ-1 is addressed via backend/main.mo (Story type with latitude/longitude fields) and backend/migration.mo (graceful migration of existing stories). REQ-2 is addressed via frontend/src/lib/locationFilter.ts (Haversine filter against story.latitude/story.longitude), frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx (teleportedLocation vs currentLocation base selection, isStoryWithinProximity filter), and related components. REQ-3 is addressed via frontend/src/components/CreateStoryDialog.tsx (pickedLocation state from map picker, never device geolocation). All acceptance criteria appear satisfied.
